name: BOM Rainfall Radar
description: Real-time national radar rainfall accumulation composite. Activate to monitor rain events affecting bridge catchment areas and scour risk.

name: BOM Wind Observations
description: Maximum wind gust observations from BOM automatic weather stations. Relevant for load assessments and temporary structure safety.

name: BOM River Heights
description: Current river and stream height gauge readings. Critical for real-time scour risk monitoring at waterway crossings.

name: Flood Inundation Mapping
description: National flood inundation extent layers from Geoscience Australia. Identifies bridge locations exposed to 1-in-100 and 1-in-500 year flood events.

name: National Road Network
description: Geoscience Australia Foundation Spatial Data Framework national road network. Provides route classification and connectivity context.

name: National Rail Network
description: National rail corridor and freight network. Useful for identifying rail-over-road and road-over-rail bridge structures.

name: NHVR Heavy Vehicle Routes
description: National heavy vehicle access routes. Overlay with bridge load ratings to identify routes at risk from oversize/overmass movements.

name: Surface Geology
description: 1:1 million scale surface geology from Geoscience Australia. Supports understanding of foundation soil and rock conditions at bridge sites.

name: Seismic Hazard Zones
description: Peak Ground Acceleration (PGA) seismic hazard map aligned with AS 1170.4. Use for earthquake importance level and design load decisions.

name: Electricity Transmission
description: National high-voltage electricity transmission network. Useful for identifying utility conflicts and clearance requirements near bridges.

name: Gas & Petroleum Pipelines
description: Gas and petroleum pipeline network from Geoscience Australia. Critical for identifying buried utility conflicts during bridge rehabilitation works.

name: Bushfire Prone Areas
description: Areas classified as high bushfire risk. Relevant for emergency access planning and identifying bridges on critical evacuation routes.

name: National Parks & Protected Areas
description: Protected area boundaries including national parks and conservation reserves. Required for environmental impact assessment of bridge works.

name: ABS Statistical Areas (SA2)
description: ABS Statistical Area Level 2 boundaries. Useful for socioeconomic analysis and traffic demand modelling around bridge locations.
